<content>1: # Axis Label/Tick Position Configuration - Specification
2: 
3: ## Overview
4: 
5: Enable content authors (admins) to control the placement of axis numbering (ticks) while standardizing the precise location of the axis titles (X/Y labels) within the Graph Editor.
6: 
7: ## Requirements
8: 
9: ### FR-001: Standardized Axis Title Positioning
10: 
11: **Priority**: MUST
12: **Description**: 
13: - Y-Axis title must always be displayed near the top (positive end) of the vertical axis, positioned slightly to the right.
14: - X-Axis title must always be displayed near the far right (positive end) of the horizontal axis, positioned slightly below it.
15: - Implementation: Use JSXGraph axis label position attributes (e.g., `label.position: 'l'` for left-side Y labels shifted up, `label.position: 'b'` for bottom-side X labels shifted right).
16: - These positions should be the default and cannot be modified by authors (standardized layout).
17: 
18: ### FR-002: X-Axis Tick Position Configuration
19: 
20: **Priority**: MUST
21: **Description**: 
22: - Admin graph editor must include a toggle to invert X-axis numbering (tick) position.
23: - X-axis numbers can appear either above (default) or below the horizontal axis line.
24: - Implementation: JSXGraph supports `position` attribute on axis ticks - use 'bottom' (default) or 'top' (inverted).
25: - This configuration must be saved with the graph spec.
26: 
27: ### FR-003: Y-Axis Tick Position Configuration
28: 
29: **Priority**: MUST
30: **Description**: 
31: - Admin graph editor must include a toggle to invert Y-axis numbering (tick) position.
32: - Y-axis numbers can appear either to the left (default) or to the right of the vertical axis line.
33: - Implementation: JSXGraph supports `position` attribute on axis ticks - use 'left' (default) or 'right' (inverted).
34: - This configuration must be saved with the graph spec.
35: 
36: ### FR-004: Default Tick Placement Behavior
37: 
38: **Priority**: MUST
39: **Description**: 
40: - Existing and new graphs must default to standard numbering placement (X above/bottom, Y left) unless explicitly modified by author.
41: - Current graphs should continue to render as before when no tick position is specified.
42: - The tickPosition field must be optional in the schema to maintain backward compatibility.
43: 
44: ### FR-005: Student View Rendering
45: 
46: **Priority**: MUST
47: **Description**: 
48: - Tick placement configurations must be accurately rendered when displayed to students.
49: - Students cannot interact with or change these settings - they only view the configured axis.
50: - Web JSXGraphBoard (`src/ui/web/exerciserenderer/graphics/JSXGraphBoard.tsx`) must pass tick position to JSXGraph axis options.
51: 
52: ### FR-006: Admin JSXGraphBoard Axis Configuration Support

57: - AxisCanvas (`src/ui/admin/ExerciseContentEditor/components/axis/AxisCanvas.tsx`) must pass axisConfig including tick position to JSXGraphBoard.
58: - This enables real-time preview of tick position changes in the admin editor.
59: 
60: ### NFR-001: Schema Extension with Backward Compatibility
61: 
62: **Priority**: MUST

64: - The AxisSpecV1 schema in `src/infra/contracts/graphics/axis.v1.ts` must be extended with optional tickPosition fields.

66: - Existing graphs without tickPosition should render with default behavior.

70:   x: z.enum(['default', 'inverted']).default('default'),
71:   y: z.enum(['default', 'inverted']).default('default'),
72: }).optional()
